series_metadata.series_title: Business Services Revenue Receipts, Deposits and Redistributions
series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of the following documents: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistribution and supporting documentation for all filings; Monthly Account Analysis Statements sent to TOS; Bad Check Letters; Monthly Reconciliations; Documentation for Refund Checks to Clients; Undeliverable Mail Containing Checks, Money Orders or State Warrants; Cash Receipts Records and other Correspondence Related to Revenue.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five (5) years, then may destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and/or Federal Auditors and audit report is released., Paper: Shred
